name: disconnect
embed_text:
File: main.py
Class: connectionManager
Name: disconnect
Signature: def disconnect(self, websocket: WebSocket):
Calls: self.active_connections.remove, self.username_map.pop

Source code:
def disconnect(self, websocket: WebSocket):
        if websocket in self.active_connections:
            self.active_connections.remove(websocket)
        self.username_map.pop(websocket, None)

name: broadcast
embed_text:
File: main.py
Class: connectionManager
Name: broadcast
Signature: async def broadcast(self, message: str):
Calls: connection.send_text

Source code:
async def broadcast(self, message: str):
        for connection in self.active_connections:
            try:
                await connection.send_text(message)
            except:
                continue

name: websocket_endpoint
embed_text:
File: main.py
Name: websocket_endpoint
Signature: async def websocket_endpoint(websocket: WebSocket):
Calls: json.dumps, json.loads, manager.broadcast, manager.connect, manager.disconnect, manager.send_personal_message, manager.set_username, manager.username_map.get, payload.get, websocket.receive_text

Source code:
async def websocket_endpoint(websocket: WebSocket):
    await manager.connect(websocket)
    try:
        while True:
            data = await websocket.receive_text()
            try:
                payload = json.loads(data)
            except:
                continue
            
            msgType = payload.get("type", "")

            if msgType == 'login':
                user = payload.get('user')
                await manager.set_username(websocket, user)
                
                await manager.send_personal_message(json.dumps({"user": "personal", "text": "You are in chat"}), websocket)
                await manager.broadcast(json.dumps({"user": "system", "text": f"{user} joined the chat"}))
            else:
                user = manager.username_map.get(websocket, 'Anonymous')
                text = payload.get('text', '')
                await manager.broadcast(json.dumps({"user": user, "text": text}))
 
    except WebSocketDisconnect:
        username = manager.username_map.get(websocket, 'Someone')
        manager.disconnect(websocket)
        await manager.broadcast(json.dumps({"user": "system", "text": f"{username} left the chat"}))
